data.title: Character Group Executes Share Buyback Programme
data.description:

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.

An update from Character ( (GB:CCT) ) is now available.

Character Group PLC has executed a share buyback, purchasing 6,000 of its ordinary shares at a price of 272.9 pence each. This transaction is part of an ongoing share buyback programme, which was announced in October 2024 and extended in May 2025. The repurchased shares have been cancelled, reducing the total number of shares in issue and potentially enhancing shareholder value. The company now holds 1,983,059 shares in treasury, with 17,748,499 shares remaining in issue, which will affect shareholder voting rights calculations.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:CCT) stock is a Hold with a £312.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Character stock, see the GB:CCT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:CCT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:CCT is a Neutral.

Character’s stock is supported by strong financial performance and attractive valuation metrics, including a low P/E ratio and high dividend yield. However, technical indicators suggest bearish momentum, which could pose short-term risks. The absence of recent earnings call insights or notable corporate events means these factors do not influence the score.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:CCT stock, click here.

More about Character

Character Group PLC operates in the toy industry, focusing on the design, development, and distribution of toys, games, and giftware. The company is known for its innovative products and has a market focus on both the UK and international markets.

data.title: Gold Royalty Corp. Upsizes Credit Facility and Redeems Debentures
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

TPT Global Tech ( (TPTW) ) has issued an announcement.

On November 25, 2025, Gold Royalty Corp. announced an amendment to its revolving credit facility, increasing it to $75 million with an option for an additional $25 million, and extended its maturity to November 2028. This move, coupled with the early redemption and conversion of its 10% convertible debentures, is expected to enhance the company’s cash flow and strengthen its balance sheet, supporting its long-term growth strategy. The transaction also involved issuing common shares to debenture holders, eliminating the principal amount outstanding of the debentures, and is considered a related party transaction.

More about TPT Global Tech

Gold Royalty Corp. is a gold-focused royalty company that provides creative financing solutions to the metals and mining industry. The company aims to invest in high-quality, sustainable, and responsible mining operations, building a diversified portfolio of precious metals royalty and streaming interests primarily in the Americas.

Current Market Cap: $7,357

For a thorough assessment of TPTW stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Australia’s Core Inflation Surges, Surpassing Expectations
data.description:
Australia’s RBA Trimmed Mean CPI YoY increased to 3.3% from the previous 3.2%, marking a 0.1 percentage point rise. This indicates a slight upward movement in core inflation. The actual figure of 3.3% surpassed analyst estimates of 3.0%, suggesting stronger-than-expected inflationary pressures. This development may prompt concerns about potential interest rate hikes, impacting interest rate-sensitive sectors such as real estate and financials. The market impact is likely to be more sentiment-driven in the short term, with investors reassessing inflation expectations and monetary policy outlook.

data.title: Japan’s Economic Index Surges, Surpassing Expectations
data.description:
Japan’s Leading Economic Index Final rose to 108.6, up from the previous reading of 107.0. This marks an increase of 1.6 points, indicating a positive shift in economic momentum.

data.title: Entain Criticizes UK Gambling Tax Hikes
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

The latest announcement is out from Entain plc ( (GB:ENT) ).

Entain plc has expressed disappointment regarding the UK Government’s decision to increase gambling taxes, which the company believes will negatively impact the industry by making regulated operators less competitive compared to the black market. The tax changes are expected to cost Entain’s UK&I Online business approximately £200 million annually, with a mitigated EBITDA impact of £100 million in 2026. Despite these challenges, Entain remains focused on its strategic priorities and is well-positioned to absorb regulatory changes due to its diverse geographic footprint and strong market positions.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:ENT) stock is a Hold with a £738.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Entain plc stock, see the GB:ENT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:ENT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:ENT is a Neutral.

Entain plc’s overall stock score is primarily impacted by its financial performance and technical analysis. The company shows strong revenue growth and cash flow management, but significant profitability challenges and high leverage pose risks. The technical indicators suggest bearish momentum, further weighing down the score. Valuation concerns due to negative earnings also contribute to the lower score.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:ENT stock, click here.

More about Entain plc

Entain plc is a FTSE100 company and one of the world’s largest sports betting and gaming groups, operating both online and in the retail sector. The Group owns a comprehensive portfolio of established brands such as BetCity, bwin, Coral, and Ladbrokes, among others. It operates in over 30 territories and is the only global operator to exclusively operate in domestically regulated or regulating markets. Entain also has a 50/50 joint venture, BetMGM, in the US and is recognized for its leadership in ESG.

Average Trading Volume: 2,036,806

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £4.78B

data.title: Primary Hydrogen Corp. Reports Promising Hydrogen Findings in Newfoundland and Labrador
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Millbank Mining Corp ( (TSE:HDRO) ) has shared an announcement.

Primary Hydrogen Corp. has completed its Phase 1 field program at the Point Rosie and Mary’s Harbour properties in Newfoundland and Labrador, focusing on soil gas sampling to detect natural hydrogen. The program revealed anomalous hydrogen values, with peak readings of 531 ppm at Point Rosie and 665 ppm at Mary’s Harbour, suggesting potential hydrogen migration pathways along fault structures. These findings, which represent the first systematic hydrogen soil gas survey on these properties, will guide future exploration initiatives as the company plans further investigations to validate these results.

More about Millbank Mining Corp

Average Trading Volume: 61,768

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$7.26M

data.title: CPH Group Adjusts 2025 Earnings Forecast Amid Market Challenges
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

CPH Group AG Class A ( (CH:CPHN) ) has provided an announcement.

CPH Group AG has adjusted its earnings forecast for 2025, anticipating an EBITDA of CHF 50 million, lower EBIT, and a reduced net result due to challenges in the global pharmaceutical packaging market, unfavorable exchange rates, and increased costs. Despite these challenges, the company expects revenue to remain above the previous year and continues to focus on cost reductions and process optimizations to improve profitability. The company remains optimistic about its medium-term growth prospects, driven by trends in health, demographics, and energy, and expects stable business development and positive earnings in 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (CH:CPHN) stock is a Hold with a CHF73.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CPH Group AG Class A stock, see the CH:CPHN Stock Forecast page.

More about CPH Group AG Class A

CPH Group AG operates in the pharmaceutical packaging industry, focusing on products and services related to health and demographics, as well as energy. The company is committed to achieving medium-term growth targets, with an emphasis on sales growth, EBITDA margins, and free cash flow margins.
